records.ety: [OE. on-behalve in the name of, bihalven by the side of, fr. AS. healf half, also side, part: akin to G. halb half, halber on account of. See Be-, and Half, n.]

defs: Advantage; favor; stead; benefit; interest; profit; support; defense; vindication.
quotes: In behalf of his mistress's beauty.
Against whom he had contracted some prejudice in behalf of his nation.
